g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does internet traffic reach my VPC?')
sendPrompt('What is an Internet Gateway in AWS?')
g.text: The VPC's door to the internet

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a public subnet and what goes in it?')
sendPrompt('What is a private subnet and what goes in it?')
sendPrompt('What kind of resources go in a public subnet?')
sendPrompt('What kind of resources go in a private subnet?')
sendPrompt('Why do we put public subnets in multiple AZs?')
sendPrompt('Why do we put private subnets in multiple AZs?')
sendPrompt('How does a load balancer span multiple AZs?')
sendPrompt('What is a NAT Gateway and why do private subnets need it?')
